center.name: Maria Aurora, Aurora
center.summary: Maria Aurora, Aurora是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon water redstart，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Maria Aurora National Park, Balbalasang-Balbalan National Park and Mount Pulag National Park
